title: Quiz: QFT Circuit
description: Test your understanding of QFT circuit implementation

questions.question: The R₂ gate in QFT is equivalent to which common gate?
questions.explanation: R₂ applies phase π/2, which is the S gate.

questions.question: How many controlled rotations are in an n-qubit QFT?
questions.explanation: There are n(n-1)/2 controlled rotations, one for each pair of qubits.

questions.question: QFT requires bit reversal (SWAP gates) at the end.
questions.explanation: The natural QFT circuit output is in reversed bit order, requiring SWAPs.
